info.title: CDP4-COMET Batch Editor
info.description: CDP4-COMET Batch Editor is intended for fast administrative tasks on a specified E-TM-10-25 EngineeringModel.

options.name: --dry
options.description:
(Default: false) Perform a dry run, i.e. do not commit
any changes to persistent data store.

options.name: --action
options.description:
Batch action to perform on the engineering model(s).
Possible value is one
of:AddParameters,RemoveParameters,MoveReferenceValuesT
oManualValues,ApplyOptionDependence,ApplyStateDependen
ce,ChangeParameterOwnership,ChangeDomain,RemoveOptionD
ependence,RemoveStateDependence,SetGenericOwners,SetSc
ale,SetShapeScaleMm,SetSubscriptionSwitch,Subscribe

options.name: --parameters
options.description:
Comma-separated list of short names of parameters. Use
in conjunction with --action=add-parameters |
remove-parameters | change-parameter-ownership |
subscribe | apply-state-dependence |
remove-state-dependence | apply-option-dependence |
remove-option-dependence.

options.name: --categories
options.description:
Comma-separated list of short names of categories. Use
in conjunction with --action. The specified action
will only be applied to Element Definitions that are a
member of at least one of the given categories.

options.name: --element-definition
options.description:
Short name of an Element Definition that sets the top
node of a decomposition subtree. Use in conjunction
with --action. The specified action will only be
applied to the given Element Definition and its
subtree of contained Element Definitions.

options.name: --included-owners
options.description:
Comma-separated list of short names of domains of
expertise. Use in conjunction with --action. The
specified action will only be applied to Element
Definitions owned by one of the given domains. If not
specified all domains will be included.

options.name: --excluded-owners
options.description:
Comma-separated list of short names of domains of
Definitions not owned by one of the given domains. The
--included-owners will be processed before the

options.name: --domain
options.description:
Short name of a domain-of-expertise owner or
subscriber. Use in conjunction with

options.name: --change-parameter-ownership
options.description: set-subscription-switch | subscribe.

options.name: --to-domain
options.description:
Short name of a domain-of-expertise to change to. Use
in conjunction with --change-domain.

options.name: --state
options.description:
Short name of an actual finite state list on which to
make parameters state dependent. Use in conjunction
with --action=apply-state-dependence and --parameters.

options.name: --parameter-switch
options.description:
Set switch on all subscriptions on parameters or
parameter overrides owned by --domain. Possible value
is: COMPUTED | MANUAL | REFERENCE.

options.name: --report
options.description:
(Default: false) Report the element definitions,
parameters and parameter subscriptions in a CSV file.

options.name: --parameter-group
options.description:
Name of a parameter group into which new parameters
will be added. If it does not exist, the parameter
group will be created. Use in conjunction with

options.name: --scale
options.description:
Short name of a measurement scale to be assigned to
selected parameters. The assignment will only be
performed if the scale is one of the possible scales
of the parameter. Use in conjunction with

options.name: --iteration
options.description: The iteration short name to work on

options.name: --server
options.description:
(Default:
https://cdp4services-test.cdp4.org) Uri of CDP server
to connect to.

options.name: --model
options.description:
Short name of the engineering model to
process. Asterisk means: process all engineering
models.

options.name: --user
options.description: (Default: admin) Username to connect with

options.name: --password
options.description:
(Default: pass) Password associated to the
username to connect with

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.
